target:
Yeah, at least I think
that's the best option…

(The teacher said to leave the decision to me…
)

(If that's the case, what I should do now
is push the teacher forward…)

I see.
If you say so, I'll do it without hesitation.

What did you mean
by that "tragedy enveloping the whole island"?
What exactly is it--

No, forget it.
Right now, I should just focus
on settling things at that place.

That's probably best.
But honestly, it's dangerous.
It'll take a lot of resolve, I think.

(The chances of it working…
are pretty low.)
I've already made up my mind.

You used Nezu's knife to stab the shadow
and defeated the monster, right?

If we can inflict a fatal wound
on Heine's shadow, we should be able to
defeat Heine.
W-why… my shadow… let me… touch it…
Can you tell it's a shadow?

I see.
It's the same as that monster earlier…

Shinpei, I think Heine's still
at that place from earlier.

Then let's go…
to Heine's place.
What were you talking about with the straw man?

Various things.
For example, that injury on your shoulder…
you should get it treated soon.

Huh?
It's not a big deal.

It doesn't look like it.
That wound looks pretty deep.

No, let's take a break here.
I can't help, but at least do some first aid.

We can't be sure he's escaped.
Since you're relying on me, do as I say.

While I do the first aid,
keep an eye on the surroundings with the straw man.
So--

Do it as quickly as you can,
and don't go too far.

(…he wouldn't have been able to
trick him back like this.)

Before, I was only thinking
about how to save you and Ryunosuke.

But that's not enough.
It won't change anything.

I think what you need to do, Hizuru,
is settle things with Heine.
That's the best choice for the future.

Ah, I see.
That's why both Hizuru and Shinpei
have already made up your minds.

Of course I've made up my mind too!
I'll fight till the end!

Hizuru, the place Heine is at
is straight ahead like this.

Ushio, from here on,
don't let Heine notice us…

Unless it's an emergency,
it's better not to make noise.

H-huh… h-huh…
I don't get it… why…

(The teacher's getting shaken up…
it's understandable…)

（If you were to show someone
the gruesome sight of their eaten-up relatives…!）

I'm not… I'm not him!
I don't know how… but I'm like this…

(He's still confused.
This is the perfect opportunity to strike.)

(But from here.
How should I approach Heine next…)

I've seen this before…
something like this.

I comforted him by petting his head
when he was crying.
It's best to pet the shadow.

But it's not like that…
I too… did that…

It's possible…
Heine might not have been there.
(She's starting to pet the shadow again…)
But Ryunosuke must have suffered more.

You suffered, Heine.
Goodbye… I'll end it.
The shadow changed shape and dodged the knife!

(Why!?
He should have been completely distracted!)

You said you'd end it.
You stabbed my shadow…
Hizuru… do you want to kill me?

You were going to kill me!?
Me!!

Friend!!
You weren't my friend at all!!

Do as you like.
You tried to get close by deceiving me and then kill me.
If you failed, you'd deserve to be killed…

Stop it!!
Get away from Hizuru!!

No… I don't want this…
I don't want this!!!

Ushio… where did you go!?
Ushio!!
(It's not like the watch went back. Ushio disappeared!?)
(From that time, I've been thinking nonstop…)
(The power of the time loop… Heine's eye power was passed on to me 14 years ago due to some incident)
(But because I interfered with the past, that future was lost, and I can no longer loop through time)
(I can no longer trace my past memories or return to the present)
(This place… might be… something like that)
